# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Deployment environment'
        required: true
        default: 'staging'
        type: choice
        options:
          - staging
          - production

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.set-artifact-name.outputs.name }}
      build-version: ${{ steps.set-version.outputs.version }}
      commit-sha: ${{ steps.set-version.outputs.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set build version
        id: set-version
        run: |
          VERSION="$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo "0.0.0-${GITHUB_SHA:0:8}")"
          SHA="${GITHUB_SHA}"
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "sha=${SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Set artifact name
        id: set-artifact-name
        run: |
          SAFE_REF="$(echo "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g')"
          echo "name=build-artifacts-${SAFE_REF}-${GITHUB_SHA:0:8}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@49933ea5288caeca8642d1e84afbd3f7d6820020
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm rebuild

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Build application
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
        run: |
          npm run build

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > build-manifest.json <<EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.set-version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit": "${{ steps.set-version.outputs.sha }}",
            "branch": "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}",
            "build_number": "${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}",
            "build_id": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "runner": "${RUNNER_NAME}"
          }
          EOF
          cp build-manifest.json dist/ 2>/dev/null || cp build-manifest.json build/ 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Generate checksum for artifacts
        run: |
          find dist/ -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; > checksums.sha256 2>/dev/null || \
          find build/ -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; > checksums.sha256 2>/dev/null || \
          echo "No build output directory found" && exit 1

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.set-artifact-name.outputs.name }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build-manifest.json
            checksums.sha256
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify checksums
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          if [ -f checksums.sha256 ]; then
            sha256sum -c checksums.sha256
            echo "Checksum verification passed"
          else
            echo "::error::Checksums file not found"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run dependency audit
        run: npm audit --production --audit-level=high
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Scan for secrets in artifacts
        run: |
          FOUND_SECRETS=0
          PATTERNS=(
            'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}'
            '(?i)(api[_-]?key|apikey|secret[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|auth[_-]?token)\s*[:=]\s*["\x27][^\s"'\'']{8,}'
            '-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |DSA )?PRIVATE KEY-----'
            'ghp_[0-9a-zA-Z]{36}'
            'gho_[0-9a-zA-Z]{36}'
          )
          for pattern in "${PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            if grep -rPl "$pattern" ./artifacts/dist/ 2>/dev/null; then
              echo "::error::Potential secret found matching pattern in artifacts"
              FOUND_SECRETS=1
            fi
          done
          if [ "$FOUND_SECRETS" -eq 1 ]; then
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "No secrets detected in artifacts"

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.event.inputs.environment == 'staging'
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
      deployments: write
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deployment-url }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-staging
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
            config/staging

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          if [ ! -f checksums.sha256 ]; then
            echo "::error::Checksums file missing - artifact integrity cannot be verified"
            exit 1
          fi
          sha256sum -c checksums.sha256
          echo "Artifact integrity verified"

      - name: Verify build manifest
        run: |
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit' artifacts/build-manifest.json)
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.commit-sha }}"
          if [ "$MANIFEST_SHA" != "$EXPECTED_SHA" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build manifest commit SHA mismatch. Expected: ${EXPECTED_SHA}, Got: ${MANIFEST_SHA}"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Build manifest verified - commit: ${MANIFEST_SHA}"

      - name: Configure cloud credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@e3dd6a429d7300a6a4c196c26e071d42e0343502
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.STAGING_AWS_ROLE_ARN }}
          aws-region: ${{ vars.AWS_REGION || 'us-east-1' }}
          role-session-name: github-deploy-staging-${{ github.run_id }}
          role-duration-seconds: 900

      - name: Deploy to staging
        id: deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          DEPLOY_TIMEOUT: "300"
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version ${BUILD_VERSION} to staging..."

          if [ -f scripts/deploy/deploy.sh ]; then
            chmod +x scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
            bash scripts/deploy/deploy.sh \
              --environment "${DEPLOY_ENV}" \
              --version "${BUILD_VERSION}" \
              --artifacts-dir "./artifacts/dist" \
              --timeout "${DEPLOY_TIMEOUT}"
          else
            echo "::warning::No deploy script found, using default deployment"
            aws s3 sync ./artifacts/dist/ "s3://${STAGING_BUCKET:-staging-deploy-bucket}/" \
              --delete \
              --no-progress \
              --metadata "version=${BUILD_VERSION},commit=${GITHUB_SHA:0:8}"
          fi

          echo "deployment-url=https://staging.example.com" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Verify deployment health
        run: |
          HEALTH_URL="https://staging.example.com/health"
          MAX_RETRIES=10
          RETRY_INTERVAL=15

          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            echo "Health check attempt ${i}/${MAX_RETRIES}..."
            HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 "${HEALTH_URL}" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")

            if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
              echo "Staging deployment health check passed"
              exit 0
            fi

            echo "Health check returned HTTP ${HTTP_STATUS}, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
            sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
          done

          echo "::error::Staging deployment health check failed after ${MAX_RETRIES} attempts"
          exit 1

  integration-tests:
    name: Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy-staging
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout test scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          sparse-checkout: |
            tests/integration
            tests/e2e

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@49933ea5288caeca8642d1e84afbd3f7d6820020
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install test dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm rebuild

      - name: Run integration tests
        env:
          TEST_BASE_URL: https://staging.example.com
          TEST_TIMEOUT: "60000"
        run: |
          npm run test:integration --if-present || echo "No integration tests configured"

      - name: Run smoke tests
        env:
          SMOKE_TEST_URL: https://staging.example.com
        run: |
          if [ -f tests/e2e/smoke.sh ]; then
            chmod +x tests/e2e/smoke.sh
            bash tests/e2e/smoke.sh
          else
            echo "Running default smoke tests..."
            curl -sf --max-time 30 "${SMOKE_TEST_URL}" > /dev/null
            curl -sf --max-time 30 "${SMOKE_TEST_URL}/health" > /dev/null
            echo "Smoke tests passed"
          fi

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
      - deploy-staging
      - integration-tests
    if: (startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/')) || (github.event.inputs.environment == 'production')
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
      deployments: write
    environment:
      name: production
      url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deployment-url }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-production
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
            config/production

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          if [ ! -f checksums.sha256 ]; then
            echo "::error::Checksums file missing - artifact integrity cannot be verified"
            exit 1
          fi
          sha256sum -c checksums.sha256
          echo "Artifact integrity verified"

      - name: Verify build manifest
        run: |
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit' artifacts/build-manifest.json)
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.commit-sha }}"
          if [ "$MANIFEST_SHA" != "$EXPECTED_SHA" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build manifest commit SHA mismatch. Expected: ${EXPECTED_SHA}, Got: ${MANIFEST_SHA}"
            exit 1
          fi
          MANIFEST_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' artifacts/build-manifest.json)
          echo "Deploying version: ${MANIFEST_VERSION} (commit: ${MANIFEST_SHA})"

      - name: Configure cloud credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@e3dd6a429d7300a6a4c196c26e071d42e0343502
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_AWS_ROLE_ARN }}
          aws-region: ${{ vars.AWS_REGION || 'us-east-1' }}
          role-session-name: github-deploy-production-${{ github.run_id }}
          role-duration-seconds: 900

      - name: Create pre-deployment backup
        run: |
          echo "Creating backup before production deployment..."
          BACKUP_TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)
          if [ -f scripts/deploy/backup.sh ]; then
            chmod +x scripts/deploy/backup.sh
            bash scripts/deploy/backup.sh --timestamp "${BACKUP_TIMESTAMP}"
          else
            echo "::warning::No backup script found, skipping backup"
          fi

      - name: Deploy to production
        id: deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          DEPLOY_TIMEOUT: "600"
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version ${BUILD_VERSION} to production..."

          if [ -f scripts/deploy/deploy.sh ]; then
            chmod +x scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
            bash scripts/deploy/deploy.sh \
              --environment "${DEPLOY_ENV}" \
              --version "${BUILD_VERSION}" \
              --artifacts-dir "./artifacts/dist" \
              --timeout "${DEPLOY_TIMEOUT}" \
              --canary
          else
            echo "::warning::No deploy script found, using default deployment"
            aws s3 sync ./artifacts/dist/ "s3://${PRODUCTION_BUCKET:-production-deploy-bucket}/" \
              --delete \
              --no-progress \
              --metadata "version=${BUILD_VERSION},commit=${GITHUB_SHA:0:8}"
          fi

          echo "deployment-url=https://www.example.com" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Verify production deployment health
        run: |
          HEALTH_URL="https://www.example.com/health"
          MAX_RETRIES=15
          RETRY_INTERVAL=20

          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            echo "Health check attempt ${i}/${MAX_RETRIES}..."
            HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/health_response -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 15 "${HEALTH_URL}" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")

            if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
              DEPLOYED_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version // empty' /tmp/health_response 2>/dev/null || true)
              if [ -n "$DEPLOYED_VERSION" ]; then
                echo "Production deployment verified - version: ${DEPLOYED_VERSION}"
              else
                echo "Production deployment health check passed (HTTP 200)"
              fi
              exit 0
            fi

            echo "Health check returned HTTP ${HTTP_STATUS}, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
            sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
          done

          echo "::error::Production deployment health check failed after ${MAX_RETRIES} attempts"
          exit 1

      - name: Rollback on failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          echo "::error::Production deployment failed, initiating rollback..."
          if [ -f scripts/deploy/rollback.sh ]; then
            chmod +x scripts/deploy/rollback.sh
            bash scripts/deploy/rollback.sh --environment production
          else
            echo "::error::No rollback script available. Manual intervention required!"
          fi

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy-production
    if: always()
    permissions:
      actions: write
    steps:
      - name: Delete build artifacts
        uses: geekyeggo/delete-artifact@f275313e70c08f6120db482d7a6b98571786e5bb
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          failOnError: false
